title: Cobblemon MonTracker
description: Adds a notification sound + message when either rare or Pokémon written down in the include list are within your render distance in Cobblemon. They have to be wild of course!
body:
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_b59e847d-b6de-4310-ac7d-1139cc8f5a2b.png)

This mod displays a message and plays an audio notification whenever a wild Legendary, Mythical, Ultra Beast, Paradox,Shiny or Pokémons of your choosing appears in Cobblemon. It includes a built-in configuration menu that allows you to individually disable notifications for each "rarity", or any Pokémon that you want.

For example, if the Legendary option is disabled but the Pokémon is also a Shiny, the mod will still play the shiny notification. Please know that custom Pokémon will not be supported by this mod unless if they have identical species names as "rarer" pokemon.

The notification will still play while in battle with that pokemon so I implemented a mute keybind, which you can toggle during battle to prevent the notification sound from playing continuously.

If the server you are playing on has any raid mods or addons, it’s highly recommended to either activate the mute toggle (this will only mute the audio, it won't disable the text notification) or you could use the config menu to disable the desired Pokémon rarity temporarily.

The audio notification for Legendary and Mythical Pokémons are the same, as are the sounds for Ultra Beasts and Paradox Pokémon. Shiny Pokémon have a unique audio and so do Pokémon in the include list

[![Buy Me a Coffee at ko-fi.com](https://storage.ko-fi.com/cdn/kofi6.png?v=6)](https://ko-fi.com/I2I21GGX15)
